title: Damageful
description: Now when you hit an entity, you will see points of flying damage in different colors, depending on the strength of your hit.
body:
Damageful is a small mod that adds flying damage points. Almost all the functionality of the mod can be customized. The mod works only on the client side and does not require installation on the server.
# In-game demonstration
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VjpzwAsALXU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# In-game config
In-game configuration is only available if the ClothConfig mod are installed.
